channel.title: DNS Record :: Tuan Dat | Cloud & Backend Developer
channel.description: PHASE 5: POINT OFFICIAL DOMAIN (DNS RECORD) Go to Route 53 > Hosted zones > sgutodolist.com. Create Record for Root domain: Click Create record. Record name: (leave blank). Type: A. Alias: Yes (Swipe the button to the right). Route traffic to: Alias ​​to CloudFront distribution. Choose distribution: Select the CloudFront domain (e.g. d123...cloudfront.net). Click Create records.

item.title: DNS Record
item.description: GIAI ĐOẠN 5: TRỎ DOMAIN CHÍNH THỨC (DNS RECORD) Vào Route 53 > Hosted zones > sgutodolist.com. Tạo Record cho Root domain: Click Create record. Record name: (để trống). Type: A. Alias: Yes (Gạt nút sang phải). Route traffic to: Alias to CloudFront distribution. Choose distribution: Chọn cái CloudFront domain (ví dụ d123...cloudfront.net). Click Create records.
